channel.title: math.GM updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.GM updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Simple close curve magnetization and application to Bellman's lost in the forest problem
item.description: arXiv:2101.00120v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In this paper, we introduce and develop the notion of simple closed-curve magnetization. We provide an application to the Bellman lost in the forest problem by assuming special geometric conditions between the hiker and the boundary of the forest.
item.arxiv:journal_reference: Int. J. Pur. and App. Math. Res. 1(1) (2021) 1-7
item.dc:creator: Theophilus Agama
